statusTrace:
self = <test-Firebase_Apptester.TestAPI object at 0x1110d1210>

    def test_firebase_func(self):
        """
    
        Before running this script ,please install package first
    
        pip3 install frida-tools
        pip3 install gevent
    
        """
    
        # HomePass Package name for checking
        package_name = "com.plumewifi.plume.dogfood"
    
        # Connect to target device
        device = frida.get_device_manager().enumerate_devices()  # Device list
        for dev in device:
            if dev.type == 'usb':  # Check USB
                print(dev.name)
                if "Your_Desired_Device_Name" in dev.name:
                    device = frida.get_device(dev.name)
                    break
    
        # Get Target Process
>       pid = device.spawn([package_name])
E       AttributeError: 'list' object has no attribute 'spawn'
